title: MiPedido
summary: Integrated shared ordering and ahead-order management platform with real-time WebSocket support.
description: MiPedido delivers a seamless ordering experience by unifying client, vendor, and administrator interfaces into a single ecosystem. With real‑time notifications via WebSockets, containerized backend services, and dedicated mobile/web applications, it makes managing group orders and advance purchases effortless and efficient for businesses and their customers.
